leadText: Leaf Tornado (Japanese: グラスミキサー Grass Mixer) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Leaf Tornado inflicts damage and has a 50% chance to lower the target's accuracy by one stage. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Leaf Tornado cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user attacks its target by encircling it in sharp leaves. This attack may also lower the target's accuracy. S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI S MD It damages an enemy. It could also lower the enemy's accuracy.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Leaf Tornado was the first Generation V move seen in the animated series . It was used by Trip's Snivy in In the Shadow of Zekrom! .
